rationale: The PINNED public half of the dedicated OFFLINE Ed25519 runtime-update signing key (D-2). This authority is SEPARATE from release/review-attestation-authority.json: it signs ONLY runtime-update manifests (claudexor-runtime-<v>.tar.gz), never release attestations, and the two keys never cross. Both the macOS updater and `claudexor release check` pin this key and refuse any runtime manifest that is unsigned, signed by an unknown key, tampered, or a version regression. The private half lives offline at ~/.claudexor/keys/runtime-update-ed25519.pem (0600) and is used only during the owner's offline signing ceremony (scripts/sign-runtime-manifest.mjs). Rotate by minting a new keypair, bumping keyId, and shipping the new public half in a signed DMG.
